decision.description: Whether to approve or reject the work

content.description: Review content: on approve this becomes the artifact, on reject this becomes feedback

activity_log.description: Terse bullet points (2-5) covering: decisions made and their rationale, significant findings that inform future stages, failed approaches ONLY when they informed a different decision. Do NOT include: routine exploration or tool use details, step-by-step implementation narrative, information already captured in the artifact content.
